site.title: Movidos por la Fe
site.description: Citizen platform to report and coordinate aid in communities affected by the earthquake in Venezuela.
site.tagline: Connecting aid with those who need it most.
site.subtitle: If you know a community, shelter, or area in Caracas, Miranda, or Catia that needs assistance, report it here. Together we can get help where it's needed most.
hero.cta_hint: It's free and takes less than 2 minutes. You just need the location details and what kind of help is needed.
stats.note: Figures update in real-time as we receive new reports.
search.placeholder: Search by place, state or city…
form.title: Report a place that needs help
form.name: Name of the place or community
form.address_placeholder: E.g.: Main street with Av. 3, Don Pedro building
form.description_placeholder: Describe what is happening, how many people need help, etc.
form.success: Report submitted successfully! Thank you for helping.
form.error: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again.
about.title: About Movidos por la Fe
about.p1: We are a citizen network connecting people affected by the June 24 earthquake with organized relief centers in Miranda, Distrito Capital, and La Guaira states.
about.p2: We operate as an information bridge: you report a community in need, and our bot instantly forwards the report to our network of allied relief centers, who coordinate and deliver help directly.
about.p3: We do not manage money or donations. We are a voluntary, non-partisan initiative focused solely on making sure the right information reaches those who can act.
acopio.title: Are you a relief center?
acopio.p1: If you are part of an organized group delivering aid to affected communities, we can integrate your Telegram group into our broadcast network.
acopio.p2: Whenever someone reports a community in need through this website, the report will arrive automatically in your group with every detail: exact location, type of help needed, photos, and contact information.
acopio.p3: You don't need to install anything or create new groups. Just join the Telegram group where the bot is already running and start receiving reports in real time. No pages to check, no paperwork.
acopio.benefit1: Reports with GPS location, photos and videos
acopio.benefit2: They arrive directly to the group, no intermediaries
acopio.benefit3: See in real time what other relief centers are handling
acopio.how1: Join the Telegram group using the link below
acopio.how2: You join the group where the bot is already running
acopio.contact_text: Join the Telegram group to receive reports:
footer.mission: Movidos por la Fe is a voluntary, non-partisan initiative. We do not solicit or manage money. Our only goal is to facilitate gathering information about places that need help to coordinate assistance effectively.
footer.emergency: In case of a medical emergency, call rescue organizations. Always verify information before sharing.
footer.problem: Found a problem on the site?
